name: github_list_self_hosted_runners_in_group_for_org
description: List the self-hosted runners in a specific organization runner group (GET /orgs/{org}/actions/runner-groups/{runner_group_id}/runners). Returns total_count and runners. per_page 1-100 default 100, page, all_pages, max_pages. Classic tokens need admin:org scope. See GitHub REST self-hosted runner groups.
